buildCommand: npx expo export --platform web && node scripts/copy-sw.js

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co; img-src 'self' data:; worker-src 'self'
